title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd:
LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LIC Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
